originalTitle: Trump posts AI video of him as doctor treating critics’ ‘derangement syndrome’
summary: President, in latest AI-generated social media post, targets prominent celebrities who have spoken out against him
content: Donald Trump on Thursday posted an AI-generated social media video portraying himself as a doctor who claims to have cured some of his most prominent celebrity critics – including Rosie O’Donnell – of the fictional condition “Trump derangement syndrome”. Outside the AI fantasy, O’Donnell said her assessment of the president remained unchanged. In a statement, she offered her own diagnosis: “He’s quite ill-and getting worse daily. The 25th amendment exists for exactly this reason. Remove. Impeach. Convict.” The testimonial-style video, shared on social media by @realDonaldTrump, features AI-generated versions of celebrities who have spoken out against the president and his administration, including Whoopi Goldberg, Edward Norton and Julia Roberts. The video uses hyper-realistic, fabricated footage to portray celebrity figures as regretful of their antipathy toward the president. “I couldn’t eat, I couldn’t sleep, constantly angry,” said a deepfake version of Robert De Niro. “I made everyone miserable around me.” Sporting a white coat and stethoscope, AI “Dr Trump” says he was not confident he could help those afflicted with TDS, a term used by the president and his allies to accuse critics of being irrationally opposed to his agenda. “They were so far gone, I wasn’t really sure,” the fake Trump says, before promoting his prescribed “treatment plan”. Patients afflicted with “TDS” should “turn off fake news, say your prayers, and if you ever feel anxious, just have a Diet Coke like me, and you’re going to see a remarkable difference in your life”, says Trump. Trump has enthusiastically dabbled in AI-generated content, some of it shocking, often to idealize his own presidency – or target his opponents. Earlier this year, Trump shared an image that depicted him as Jesus healing the sick. He deleted the post after a backlash from high-profile Christian commentators and allies, who called the image blasphemous. In another, he portrayed himself as the Pope amid a feud with the pontiff, Leo XIV. Last year, he gleefully posted a fake Time magazine cover depicting himself as a king wearing a crown. “Long live the king!” he declared. In February, Trump shared a racist video portraying Barack Obama and Michelle Obama as apes, prompting furious backlash. He deleted the post but refused to apologize. The White House has largely treated the posts as humorous and part of the president’s political messaging style. In response to the president’s latest video, Davis Ingle, a White House spokesperson, said posting it was Trump’s “right”. “Trump Derangement Syndrome is a crippling disease that has unfortunately rotted the brains of many people,” he added. Officials did not confirm whether the White House had contacted any of the actors depicted about using their likeness.
chineseTitle: 特朗普发布了他作为医生治疗批评者“精神错乱综合症”的 AI 视频
chineseSummary: 总统在人工智能生成的最新社交媒体帖子中针对公开反对他的知名名人
chineseContent: 唐纳德·特朗普周四发布了一段人工智能生成的社交媒体视频，将自己描绘成一名医生，声称已经治愈了一些最著名的名人批评者——包括罗西·奥唐纳——患有虚构的“特朗普精神错乱综合症”。在人工智能幻想之外，奥唐纳表示她对总统的评价保持不变。在一份声明中，她提出了自己的诊断：“他病得很重，而且每天都在恶化。第 25 条修正案正是出于这个原因而存在。删除。弹劾。定罪。”这段感言风格的视频由 @realDonaldTrump 在社交媒体上分享，其中包含人工智能生成的公开反对总统及其政府的名人版本，其中包括乌比·戈德堡、爱德华·诺顿和朱莉娅·罗伯茨。该视频使用超现实、捏造的镜头来描绘名人人物对他们对总统的反感感到遗憾。 “我吃不下，睡不着，总是生气，”罗伯特·德尼罗的深度伪造版说道。 “我让周围的每个人都感到痛苦。”身穿白大褂、戴着听诊器的人工智能“特朗普博士”表示，他没有信心能够帮助那些患有 TDS 的人，TDS 是总统及其盟友用来指责批评者非理性反对他的议程的术语。 “他们已经走了这么远，我不太确定，”假特朗普在宣传他规定的“治疗计划”之前说道。特朗普说，患有“TDS”的患者应该“关掉假新闻，祈祷，如果你感到焦虑，就像我一样喝一杯健怡可乐，你就会看到你的生活发生显着变化”。特朗普热情地涉足人工智能生成的内容，其中一些内容令人震惊，通常是为了理想化自己的总统职位 — — 或针对他的对手。今年早些时候，特朗普分享了一张将他描绘为耶稣治愈的照片
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于全球新闻信号，适合用于观察外部环境、政策变化、地缘风险和市场情绪。
